eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 11:39 PM on JUL 2, 2026 Effective until 10:39 PM JUL 3, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: Due to Wildland fire Colorado City west of interstate 25 between Huerfano county to Burnt Mill is under mandatory evacuation. This includes Hatchet Ranch, Burnt Mill, and all of Colorado City west of the interstate. Evacuate quickly, winds make the fire unpredictable and move quickly. If you need assistance evacuating call 9 1 1. MANDATORY EVACUATION FOR ALL OF COLORADO CITY BETWEEN BURTN MILL RD AND HUERFANO COUNTY.
